inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman in a sequined evening gown stands silhouetted against warm pendant lights inside a cozy vintage bookstore. Shot on a 50mm lens, standard portrait framing, positioned off-center using the rule of thirds. Harsh midday sunlight streams through a large window, casting sharp dramatic shadows across towering bookshelves. Her dark hair is swept into an elegant updo with soft face-framing caramel highlights catching the light. Sharp jawline, captivating cat-like eyes with smoky liner, expression gentle and softly inviting. Flawless porcelain skin with dewy finish, styled editorial makeup. She leans slightly against a wooden ladder, one hand resting on aged leather-bound spines. Golden dust particles float in the light beams. Cinematic depth of field, warm amber tones, editorial fashion photography.
